description: Composition Black and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has mega sleeves, a mandarin collar that extends into a buttoned chest placket, overlocked pin tucks flowing from the shoulders to the bust that act as design elements and slit side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
